channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Pixies' Black Francis on 'The Night the Zombies Came,' 35 years of 'Doolittle' and Steve Albini
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The undead, Medieval-themed suburban restaurants, the mall. Druidism, decapitated chickens, rebirth. Church, sheep slaughter, science fiction. These are a few, not all, of the topics touched upon on the Pixies' 10th studio album, “The Night the Zombies Came.
item.dc:creator: MARIA SHERMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kentucky lawmaker dies weeks after lawnmower plunges into swimming pool
item.description: Kentucky state Sen. Johnnie Turner (R) died Tuesday from injuries he suffered after being thrown into an empty swimming pool while riding his lawnmower just over a month ago.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Georgia officials say they thwarted an attempt to crash a state election website
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Georgia election officials acted quickly earlier this month to thwart an attempt to flood the state's absentee voter portal in an apparent attempt to crash the site, the secretary of state's office said.
item.dc:creator: KATE BRUMBACK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: McDonald's and Boar's Head outbreaks may have you worried. Experts say the food supply is safe
item.description: From Boar's Head deli meat and waffles to McDonald's Quarter Pounders, this year's illness outbreaks — some deadly — and food recalls may have Americans wondering whether there are new risks in the U.S. food supply.
item.dc:creator: JONEL ALECCIA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fischer's Senate fight in Nebraska leaves Republicans frustrated
item.description: Republicans are upset that the race to protect Sen. Deb Fischer (R-Neb.) in deep red Nebraska has gotten competitive, forcing the party to spend precious resources that could be used elsewhere in its fight for the Senate majority.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Florida mailman stabs lawncare worker over parking: deputies
item.description: The sheriff's office says authorities now believe the stabbing was the result of an argument between a postal worker and a lawncare professional.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, NewsNation

item.title: Florida sues Garland for blocking Trump assassination attempt investigation
item.description: Florida sued Attorney General Merrick Garland on Wednesday, saying the Justice Department is improperly blocking the state from investigating the second assassination attempt of former President Trump. Gov.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: Georgia's Gullah-Geechee community seeks path forward after deadly dock collapse
item.description: SAVANNAH, Ga. (AP) — The partial collapse of a ferry dock that claimed the lives of seven people attending a cultural festival has left a historic Black community in Georgia struggling with how to move forward.
item.dc:creator: TERRY TANG and RUSS BYNUM, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Louisiana governor forces New Orleans homeless encampment to move ahead of Taylor Swift shows
item.description: Ahead of Taylor Swift shows in New Orleans this weekend, Louisiana Gov. Jeff Landry authorized the relocation of a homeless encampment from the popular tourist area.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boots for dogs become 'Croctober' smash; sell out fast
item.description: Footwear company Crocs developed a special edition boot for dogs in celebration of "Croctober" and they were a big hit. The shoe brand releases a fan-inspired product each October and this year it was all about man's best friend, KTLA sister station WKRG reported earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: DNC hits Trump over reported praise of Hitler's generals in mobile billboard
item.description: The Democratic National Committee (DNC) is deploying a mobile billboard ahead of former President Donald Trump’s rally in Las Vegas on Thursday, hitting him over his past reported praise of Adolf Hitler’s generals.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, Fox 5

item.title: DNA links suspected serial killer to 19-year-old's cold case murder in Illinois
item.description: Authorities have linked a suspected serial killer to the kidnapping and murder of a 19-year-old Illinois woman, more than 45 years after her death.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, Fox 5

item.title: The EPA imposes stricter standards to protect children from exposure to lead paint
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Two weeks after setting a nationwide deadline for removal of lead pipes, the Biden administration is imposing strict new limits on dust from lead-based paint in older homes and child-care facilities.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Texas teen arrested 3 months after Sonic manager shot and killed over fake money payment
item.description: A Texas teen accused of shooting, killing a San Antonio Sonic manager after trying to pay for food with counterfeit money was caught more than three months later in Dallas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Should elephants have the same rights as people? A court in Colorado may decide
item.description: Colorado's highest court will hear arguments on whether the African female elephants should be legally able to challenge their captivity under a long-held process used by prisoners to dispute their detention.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Arizona teen arrested on terrorism charges in alleged plot against Phoenix Pride Festival
item.description: Marvin Aneer Jalo, 17, allegedly ordered ingredients to make explosives, which were sent to his home, so he could perhaps bomb a Pride parade, according to court documents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tim Burton talks about his dread of AI as an exhibition of his work opens in London
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The imagination of Tim Burton has produced ghosts and ghouls, Martians, monsters and misfits — all on display at an exhibition that is opening in London just in time for Halloween. But you know what really scares him? Artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Funeral home owners accused of storing decaying bodies expected to plead guilty to COVID-19 fraud
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Colorado funeral home owners accused of misspending nearly $900,000 in COVID-19 pandemic relief funds and living lavishly, all while allegedly stashing 190 decaying bodies in a building and sending grieving families fake ashes, are expected to plead guilty to federal charges Thursday.
item.dc:creator: JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The 2024 election is major source of stress: Survey
item.description: A total of 72% worry that the election results could lead to violence, and 56% believe the election could lead to the end of democracy in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Homemade meal sends dozens of Maryland employees to the hospital
item.description: NAFCO Wholesale Seafood Distributors reported that 46 of its workers at its Jessup, Maryland, facility were taken to nearby hospitals after being sickened by homemade food.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lara Trump: Glad Donald Trump is endorsing early, mail-in voting
item.description: She says her father-in-law "understands how important this is to making sure that he wins on election night.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Georgia, candidates target of ‘sustained’ cyberattacks: Reports
item.description: CNN says Georgia fended off the likely overseas attack, while Microsoft says China, Russia and Iran are targeting the U.S. election process.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Man allegedly asked for ‘rapiest frat’ at NC State before waving gun: warrant
item.description: A new search warrant reveals more details about a man arrested at North Carolina State University in September for carrying a gun on campus.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Quarter Pounders are off the menu at 20% of McDonald's in US as E. coli cases are investigated
item.description: McDonald’s worked Wednesday to reassure customers that its U.S. restaurants are safe as federal investigators tried to pinpoint the cause of a deadly E. coli outbreak linked to the fast-food giant's Quarter Pounder hamburgers. McDonald's pulled Quarter Pounders from one-fifth of its U.S.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pennsylvania high court gives voters provisional option if their mail ballots get rejected
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — Pennsylvania's highest court on Wednesday said people whose mail ballots are rejected for not following technical procedures in state law can cast provisional ballots, a decision sure to affect some of the thousands of mail-in votes likely to be rejected this fall.
item.dc:creator: MARK SCOLFORO and MARC LEVY, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Political strategist James Carville lists 3 reasons why he thinks Harris will win
item.description: “The biggest reason Mr. Trump will lose is that the whole Republican Party has been on a losing streak since Mr. Trump took it over,” James Carville said in an essay published by The New York Times.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Georgia voter role audit finds 20 non-citizens registered
item.description: None has cast a ballot in November’s general election, but nine of the 20 had voted in previous elections and the other 11 had no record of voting.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Well-known pilot Chuck Coleman killed in air show crash in Las Cruces
item.description: He performed at hundreds of air shows and had provided more than 3,000 rides in aerobatic aircraft, the City of Las Cruces added.
item.dc:creator: Dave Burge, NewsNation

item.title: Well-known pilot Chuck Coleman killed in air show crash in Las Cruces
item.description: The pilot who was killed in a crash at a Las Cruces air show over the weekend has been identified as Charles Thomas "Chuck" Coleman of California, the City of Las Cruces said in an update issued Monday afternoon, Oct. 21.
item.dc:creator: Dave Burge, Fox 5

item.title: Carville lists 3 reasons why he thinks Harris will win
item.description: “The biggest reason Mr. Trump will lose is that the whole Republican Party has been on a losing streak since Mr. Trump took it over,” he said in an essay published Wednesday by The New York Times.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: They made 36 million Corn Poppers. Here's how they pick the right ones for the Toy Hall of Fame
item.description: ROCHESTER, N.Y. (AP) — When curators at the National Toy Hall of Fame learned last fall that the Fisher-Price Corn Popper had been voted in as part of the class of 2023, they knew they had some serious work to do.
item.dc:creator: CAROLYN THOMPSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dodgers phenom Fernando Valenzuela dies at 63
item.description: Fernando Valenzuela, the Mexican-born phenom for the Los Angeles Dodgers who inspired “Fernandomania” while winning the NL Cy Young Award and Rookie of the Year in 1981, has died.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Surfer dies after being struck, impaled by swordfish
item.description: A longtime surfer and travel guide died after being impaled by a swordfish off the coast of Indonesia. The 36-year-old Italian surfer identified as Giulia Manfrini by her business partner was struck in the chest by the swordfish while surfing west of Sumatra in the Indian Ocean, BBC News reported.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: PHOTOS: White House public tour gets makeover with 'reimagined' visitor experience
item.description: The White House public tour is getting an extreme makeover, with new digital exhibits, an expanded route and more access to rooms poised to be part of the "reimagined" experience for visitors.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: WATCH: Footage appears to show moment helicopter crash topples radio tower in Houston
item.description: A surveillance camera mounted outside of a Houston photo studio appears to have captured the moment a helicopter crash toppled a radio tower on Sunday, killing four people.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Zenni Optical offering free glasses for those affected by Hurricane Helene, Milton
item.description: Zenni Optical, a Nothern California company that sells prescription glasses online, is offering free glasses for those impacted by Hurricanes Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Footage appears to show moment helicopter crash topples radio tower in Houston
item.description: A surveillance camera mounted outside of a Houston photo studio appears to have captured the moment a helicopter crash toppled a radio tower on Sunday, killing four people.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5
